roadmaps.title: Software Development Engineer
roadmaps.description: Complete roadmap to become an SDE at top tech companies

items.title: Learn a Programming Language
items.description: Master C++, Java, or Python. Focus on syntax, OOP, STL/Collections.

items.title: Data Structures Basics
items.description: Arrays, Strings, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Hash Maps

items.title: Basic Algorithms
items.description: Sorting (Merge, Quick, Heap), Searching (Binary Search), Recursion

items.title: Version Control
items.description: Git basics: clone, commit, push, pull, branch, merge

items.title: Trees & Graphs
items.description: Binary Trees, BST, Heaps, Graph BFS/DFS, Shortest Path

items.title: Dynamic Programming
items.description: Memoization, Tabulation, Common patterns (Knapsack, LCS, LIS)

items.title: Advanced Data Structures
items.description: Tries, Segment Trees, Disjoint Set Union

items.title: Problem Solving
items.description: Solve 150+ problems on LeetCode/Codeforces. Focus on Medium difficulty.

items.title: Operating Systems
items.description: Processes, Threads, Scheduling, Memory, Deadlocks, File Systems

items.title: DBMS
items.description: SQL, Normalization, ACID, Indexing, Transactions

items.title: Computer Networks
items.description: OSI, TCP/IP, HTTP, DNS, Sockets

items.title: Object-Oriented Design
items.description: SOLID principles, Design Patterns (Factory, Singleton, Observer)

items.title: HLD Basics
items.description: Load Balancing, Caching, CDN, Message Queues, Microservices

items.title: Database Design
items.description: SQL vs NoSQL, Sharding, Replication, CAP Theorem

items.title: Practice Designs
items.description: URL Shortener, Twitter, Chat System, Netflix

items.title: LLD Practice
items.description: Parking Lot, Elevator, Library Management

items.title: Mock Interviews
items.description: Practice with peers, use Pramp/Interviewing.io

items.title: Company Research
items.description: Study target companies, their tech stack, culture

items.title: Resume Building
items.description: Highlight projects, quantify achievements, tailor to roles

items.title: Behavioral Prep
items.description: STAR method, leadership principles, conflict resolution

roadmaps.title: Data Analyst
roadmaps.description: Roadmap to become a Data Analyst

items.title: Statistics & Probability
items.description: Mean, Median, Mode, Standard Deviation, Distributions, Hypothesis Testing

items.title: Excel / Spreadsheets
items.description: VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables, Charts, Conditional Formatting, Data Validation

items.title: SQL Fundamentals
items.description: SELECT, JOINs, GROUP BY, HAVING, Subqueries, Window Functions

items.title: Basic Python
items.description: Python basics, Data types, Libraries (NumPy, Pandas)

items.title: Python for Data Analysis
items.description: Pandas for data manipulation, NumPy for numerical computing, Data cleaning techniques

items.title: Data Visualization
items.description: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly. Learn to tell stories with data.

items.title: Tableau / Power BI
items.description: Dashboard creation, Interactive visualizations, Publishing reports

items.title: Advanced SQL
items.description: Window functions, CTEs, Query optimization, Stored procedures

items.title: Machine Learning Basics
items.description: Linear Regression, Classification, Clustering (using scikit-learn)

items.title: Big Data Basics
items.description: Understanding Hadoop, Spark basics, Cloud platforms (AWS/GCP)

items.title: A/B Testing
items.description: Experiment design, Statistical significance, Interpreting results

items.title: Business Acumen
items.description: KPIs, Metrics, Business case analysis, Stakeholder communication

items.title: Projects
items.description: Build 3-4 portfolio projects: EDA, Dashboard, Prediction model, Business report

items.title: Resume & LinkedIn
items.description: Showcase projects, certifications (Google Data Analytics, IBM)

items.title: Interview Prep
items.description: SQL interview questions, Case studies, Guesstimates

items.title: Networking
items.description: LinkedIn connections, Data community events, Kaggle participation

sections.name: Education
bullets: Relevant coursework: DS & Algorithms, DBMS, OS, Computer Networks

sections.name: Education
bullets: Relevant coursework: Statistics, Data Mining, Machine Learning

sections.name: Skills
bullets: Tools: Excel, SQL, Tableau, Power BI
Other: A/B Testing, ETL, Data Modeling

sections.name: Experience
bullets: Analyzed [data type] identifying [insight] that drove [business outcome]
Reduced [metric] by X% through data-driven recommendations

sections.name: Projects
bullets: Performed EDA on [dataset] with [X rows] identifying [key findings]
